preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.collapseReasoningDescription: Hide the model's live thinking while it generates.

localization.title: Localization
localization.updateDefaultsDescription: Would you like to update your units based on the new location?

modification.confirmReset: Are you sure? You will lose any changes that you made.

network.title: Network
network.proxyDescription: When enabled, requests are routed through Thunderbolt's cloud proxy.
network.proxyWebOnlyDescription: Proxying is required in the web app to bypass browser CORS restrictions.
network.proxySignInDescription: Sign in to enable cloud proxy.

telemetry.title: Help Thunderbolt Improve
telemetry.usageDataDescriptionPrefix: Help us improve the app by sending anonymous usage info such as crashes, performance, and usage. Read more about our
telemetry.unavailableDescription: Telemetry isn't configured for this organization, so no usage data is being collected.

data.title: Data
data.exportDescription: Export all of your data as JSON.
data.importDescription: Import your data from previously exported JSON.
data.importDialogBody: This file contains {{count}} rows{{exportedBy}}{{exportedOn}}. Rows that share an ID with existing data will be overwritten with the file's version and synced to your other devices. This can't be undone.
data.importAccountMismatch: ⚠ This export was made by a different account ({{email}}). Importing it here will mix that data into your account — confirm only if you intend to.
data.invalidExportFile: This file doesn't look like a Thunderbolt export.
data.couldNotReadImportFile: Could not read the import file.
data.mustSignInToImport: You must be signed in to import data.
data.importSuccess: Imported {{count}} rows. The app may take a moment to reflect new chats.
data.resetDatabaseDialogDescription: This will permanently delete all of your local data including settings, chat history, and cached information. This action cannot be undone.
data.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data on our servers and this device.
data.deleteAccountDialogDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all of your data on our servers and on this device, including settings, chat history, and cached information. This action cannot be undone.
data.cloudSyncDescription: Keep all of your devices synced.
data.cloudSyncEnabledDescription: Enable cloud synchronization to keep your data synced across devices.

devices.title: Devices
devices.emptyDescription: No devices yet. Sign in with sync to see devices here.
devices.pairDescription: Paste a pairing code or upload its QR image to bind this device to its peer-to-peer identity.
devices.couldNotBind: Could not bind the pairing code

developer.title: Developer Settings
developer.cloudUrlDescription: The URL of the Thunderbolt backend
developer.nativeFetchDescription: Proxy HTTP requests through Tauri to bypass CORS
developer.nativeFetchUnavailableDescription: This feature is only available on some desktop versions of the app that were built with the native_fetch feature flag.
developer.debugPostHogDescription: Enable verbose analytics logging in the console

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.emptyDescription: Check back later for new integrations

search.name: Web Search
search.description: Search the web for current information.

fetch_content.name: Fetch Page Content
fetch_content.description: Fetch and read content from a public web page.

google_check_inbox.name: Check Inbox
google_check_inbox.description: Check your Gmail inbox for recent emails.

google_get_email.name: Get Email
google_get_email.description: Open a Gmail message with its full content.

google_draft_email.name: Draft Email
google_draft_email.description: Create a Gmail draft (a new email or a reply).

google_check_calendar.name: Check Calendar
google_check_calendar.description: Check Google Calendar for upcoming events.

microsoft_list_messages.name: List Messages
microsoft_list_messages.description: List Outlook messages with optional filtering.

microsoft_search_onedrive.name: Search OneDrive
microsoft_search_onedrive.description: Search OneDrive files by name or content.

microsoft_get_onedrive_file_content.name: Read OneDrive File
microsoft_get_onedrive_file_content.description: Read text content from a OneDrive file.

models.title: Models
models.enterApiKey: Enter an API key to test the connection before saving.
models.testSuccessDescription: Successfully got a response from the model.
models.testFailureDescription: Received an error while testing the model.
models.modelNoToolSupport: This model does not seem to support tool usage.
models.emptyDescription: Get started by adding your first AI model.
models.removeModelDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this model? This action cannot be undone.
models.urlRequiredCustom: URL is required for Custom providers
models.apiKeyRequired: API Key is required for this provider
models.networkRequestFailed: Network request failed (the browser blocked the request or the server is unreachable).
models.serverUnknownError: Server responded with an unknown error.

mcpServers.title: MCP Servers
mcpServers.name: Name
mcpServers.pasteConfig: Paste an mcpServers config. Only remote (http/sse) servers are supported; non-Bearer auth headers are ignored.
mcpServers.authorizedDescription: Authorized — re-run the OAuth flow if access was revoked
mcpServers.removeServerDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this MCP server? This action cannot be undone.
mcpServers.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to this server. Check the URL and that the server is reachable.
mcpServers.requiresAuthorization: This server requires authorization. Click Authorize to connect.
mcpServers.emptyDescription: Get started by adding your first MCP server connection.
mcpServers.needsOAuthBody: This server uses OAuth. Add it and authorize to connect.
mcpServers.needsTokenBody: This server needs a personal access token or API key. Paste it in the Credential field above, then test again.
mcpServers.tokenRejectedBody: The server rejected the credential — check your bearer token or API key.
mcpServers.connectionFailedBody: Could not connect to the MCP server. Please check the URL and try again.
mcpServers.urlOrIrohHelper: A URL, or paste an iroh ticket from your bridge for a peer-to-peer connection (a bare NodeId works only if the peer is discoverable).
mcpServers.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Please try again.
mcpServers.importFailed: Could not import servers. Please try again.

skills.title: Skills
skills.emptyDescriptionPrefix: Skills are reusable instruction templates you summon in chat with
skills.unsavedCreateDescription: You'll lose what you've added so far.
skills.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the skill. Other skills that reference it may no longer resolve.
skills.dependentsDescription_one: One skill references this. If you {{action}} it, it may no longer resolve:
skills.dependentsDescription_other: {{count}} skills reference this. If you {{action}} it, they may no longer resolve:
skills.name: Name
skills.descriptionHelp: Helps the agent decide when to use this skill. Be specific about when it applies.
skills.disableDescription: Disable skill. The AI won't use it, and it will be unpinned.

slugError.tooLong: Slug must be {{max}} characters or fewer.
slugError.invalidChars: Slug may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
slugError.edgeHyphen: Slug cannot start or end with a hyphen.

agents.title: Agents
agents.provenanceBuiltIn: Your agent · built into the app
agents.removeAgentDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}?
agents.setUpDescription: Run {{name}} on your machine, then add it as a custom agent to connect.
agents.editCustomDescription: Update the connection details for this remote agent.
agents.addCustomDescription: Connect a remote agent that speaks the Agent Client Protocol.
agents.name: Name
agents.connectionFailedDescription: Could not connect to the agent.
agents.irohAuthorizeTitle: Authorize this app on your bridge
agents.irohAuthorizeDescription: Run this on the machine hosting the bridge, then add it — the connection is verified on first use.
agents.pairingIdentityFailed: Couldn't load this app's pairing identity: {{error}}
agents.cliDescriptionTauri: Install the standalone thunderbolt terminal agent to ~/.local/bin.
agents.cliDescriptionWeb: Install the standalone thunderbolt terminal agent from your shell.
agents.addPath: Add ~/.local/bin to your PATH, then restart your shell:
agents.buildFromSource: Build it from source instead (requires Bun):
agents.urlPlaceholder: wss://example.com/ws or paste an iroh ticket
agents.urlHelper: A WebSocket endpoint, or paste an iroh ticket from your bridge for a peer-to-peer connection (a bare NodeId works only if the peer is discoverable).
agents.urlInvalid: Enter a wss:// URL or an iroh ticket
agents.cliProvenance: Your agent · runs in your terminal
agents.cliAboutBody: Use Thunderbolt from the command line.

appVersion.title: App Version
appVersion.mobileUpdateDescription: Open the store to check for updates.
appVersion.versionAvailable: Version {{version}} is available. See the update prompt to install.
appVersion.newVersionAvailable: A new version is available. See the update prompt to install.
appVersion.errorRestart: Couldn't restart to apply the update

agentDetail.removeError: Couldn't remove the agent. Please try again.
agentDetail.removeConfirmDescription: This removes the connection from Thunderbolt only. Nothing on the remote server is changed.
agentDetail.builtInAbout: Thunderbolt is the agent built into the app — always here, no setup needed. It draws on everything you have enabled in your library (skills, integrations, and MCP servers) to help with whatever you are working on.
agentDetail.systemManaged: Managed by your deployment — always available, no setup needed.
agentDetail.name: Name
agentDetail.enabledHelp: Disabled agents stay out of the chat agent picker.
agentDetail.irohConnection: Peer-to-peer via iroh — the connection is verified when a chat starts.

editableField.saveError: Couldn't save the {{field}}. Please try again.
